introText: If you've been injured in a car accident in Modesto, The Azizi Firm is here to help. As the largest city in Stanislaus County and a major Central Valley community, Modesto's growing population and agricultural traffic create significant accident risks. We represent victims of auto accidents, truck accidents, motorcycle accidents, and rideshare accidents. Our experienced car accident attorneys fight to get you maximum compensation for medical bills, lost wages, pain and suffering, and all other damages.

sections.header: Types of Car Accident Cases We Handle
sections.body: Our Modesto car accident lawyers handle all types of motor vehicle accidents: rear-end collisions on SR-99 and McHenry Avenue, T-bone accidents at major intersections, head-on collisions on rural roads, hit and run accidents, drunk driving accidents, distracted driving accidents, rideshare (Uber/Lyft) accidents, truck accidents involving agricultural transport and dairy industry vehicles, motorcycle accidents, pedestrian accidents in downtown Modesto, and bicycle accidents.

sections.header: Common Causes of Car Accidents in Modesto
sections.body: Modesto's position along the SR-99 corridor and its agricultural economy creates unique accident risks. Common causes include distracted driving, speeding on open rural roads, drunk driving, fatigued agricultural workers driving after long shifts, heavy truck traffic on SR-99, accidents at complex intersections like Briggsmore Avenue and McHenry Avenue, and dense tule fog in winter causing multi-vehicle collisions. Our attorneys investigate every accident to identify all liable parties.

faq.question: What should I do after a car accident in Modesto?
faq.answer: Call 911, seek medical attention, document the scene thoroughly including weather and road conditions, exchange information with other drivers, get witness contacts, and contact a car accident lawyer before speaking with insurance companies. If fog was a factor, note the visibility conditions.

faq.question: How much is my Modesto car accident case worth?
faq.answer: Case value depends on injury severity, medical costs, lost wages, pain and suffering, and available insurance coverage. Stanislaus County juries tend to be moderate and practical. We offer free case evaluations.

whyHireText: Our founder previously defended major insurance companies, giving us insider knowledge of how they evaluate and settle claims. We understand the Central Valley legal landscape and have experience with Stanislaus County courts, ensuring your case receives the dedicated attention it deserves.
contactUsText: If you've been injured in a car accident in Modesto, contact The Azizi Firm today for a free, confidential consultation. No fees unless we win.
